header.description: Split data into batches and iterate over each batch

splitInBatchesNotice.displayName: You may not need this node — n8n nodes automatically run once for each input item. More info

batchSize.description: The number of items to return with each call

reset.description: Whether the node starts again from the beginning of the input items. This will treat incoming data as a new set rather than continuing with the previous items.
